Too many golfers are still stuck in the dark ages, fumbling with soggy paper scorecards, scratching out scores with stubby pencils, and wasting precious time after every round trying to calculate who owes what for skins, greenies, and Nassau bets. GolfPulse changes everything. Our app lets you track live scores hole-by-hole on your phone, automatically calculates every wager in real-time (so everyone knows the stakes as they play), maintains accurate handicaps with historical round tracking, and creates beautiful digital scorecards you can review anytime. No more arguments, no more manual math, no more lost paper scorecards blowing away in the wind. Just pure golf with instant, transparent scoring and automatic bet settlements.
